description_long: This is a double-headed battle axe with a robust, metallic construction and a distinctive, aggressive blade design. The axe features two large, symmetrical blades with angular, jagged edges, giving it a formidable appearance. The central head is thick and reinforced, with a pronounced ridge running along the top, and a metal loop or guard on one side. The handle is wrapped in a reddish-brown material, likely leather, providing a secure grip and some cushioning for the user. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and tapers slightly towards the base, which is capped with a metal pommel. The overall finish is rugged and utilitarian, with visible wear and a matte metallic sheen.
description: A double-headed battle axe with jagged, angular blades and a straight, leather-wrapped handle. The metal surface is rugged and matte, with a robust, intimidating design.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the front, showing both large, jagged blades and the central head with a visible metal loop on the right.
description_view_1: The axe is viewed edge-on, highlighting the thickness of the central head and the narrow profile of the blades.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the blades and the handle, with the metal loop now on the left side.
description_view_3: The axe is seen from the opposite edge, again showing the thickness of the head and the straight alignment of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle, wrapped in reddish-brown leather, with a metal pommel; provides a secure, grippy surface.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, symmetrical blades with jagged, angular edges and a thick central head; includes a metal loop or guard on one side.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with visible integration of blade and handle.
